title: NeoOrigins Origin Layer
description: A picker layer — ordered list of origin IDs the player can select from. File path: data/<namespace>/origins/origin_layers/<layer>.json. Use namespace=neoorigins, layer=origin to merge into the main picker tab.

origins.description: Ordered list of origin IDs (namespace:path). First entry is the default selection.

name.description: Optional display name for this layer (translation key or literal).

order.description: Lower values render earlier in the picker. Default 0.

replace.description: If true, this file fully replaces earlier definitions of the same layer ID from lower-priority datapacks. Default false (merge).
